title: FPV Drones
description: Adds in flyable FPV Drones for Minecraft - Mechanical mosquito simulator
body:
Made by the developers of MCSP and Immersive vehicles, comes a groundbreaking new take on drones, drone flight and drone warfare, all in the confines of your minecraft world.

![drone bbzbzsshshs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfaed2b740cbbf06f6fc8226232ade7904ca3f01.webp)

This mod goes beyond just flying around a static camera, the FPV mod uses:
- proper immersive drone cameras
- battery voltage simulation
- realistic movement & flight
- trackpad support
- joystick support
- even mouse & keyboard support for flight controls!
- signal distance simulations
- customizable payload
- cool FPV goggles for you to wear
- real thermal cameras!
- A bunch more!

With attention to detail and sound design, you'll enjoy an immersive flying expereicne that closley mirrors real life drone piloting instead of arcadey and unrealistic controls. 
You can fly around your world, preform trickshots, hold drone races with friends or send an explosive gift to the doors (or faces) of your uh.. less preferred company! 


We love what we do, but If you wish to further support delelopment, consider having a look here <3

If patreon doenst work for you, feel free to use boosty!


[![suppr development](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/589bf56e147e7611838f653b7760c7f972620ffa.png)](https://boosty.to/pmckinder)
